title: Williams-Sonoma - Thesis Shift To 'Buy'

title: Williams-Sonoma: Squeezing Lemons And Shorts
text: Despite a 23% short interest in early 2018 and the ensuing coronavirus pandemic, the common shares of home furnishing retail stalwart Williams-Sonoma squeezed a three-bagger return for the bulls. In another defiance of the retail apocalyptic bears, the company increased e-commerce channel sales from 50% to 70% of revenues during the same period.

title: After Plunging 15.7% in 4 Weeks, Here's Why the Trend Might Reverse for Williams-Sonoma (WSM)
text: Williams-Sonoma (WSM) has become technically an oversold stock now, which implies exhaustion of the heavy selling pressure on it. This, combined with strong agreement among Wall Street analysts in revising earnings estimates higher, indicates a potential trend reversal for the stock in the near term.
